response.overview: http://KEXP.ORG presents King Gizzard & The Lizard Wizard performing live in the KEXP studio. Recorded August 18, 2019.  Songs: Mars For The Rich Venusian 1 Perihelion Venusian 2 Hell  Host: Cheryl Waters Audio Engineers: Sam Joseph & Kevin Suggs Audio Mixer: Stu Mackenzie Cameras: Jim Beckmann, Alaia D'Alessandro, Scott Holpainen & Luke Knecht Editor: Jim Beckmann
